title: Save My PC
description: A collection of Fabric mods to save your potentially potato PC (Or improve the performance of mods on a modded block game).
body:
So you might have a PC that is either old, slow, or maybe it doesn't have difficulty running Minecraft, maybe it needs a helping hand with running the hundreds of mods you might have?
Introducing Save My PC, a modpack purely designed to, as the name implies, save your PC from the laggy, unoptimized chaos that is Minecraft: Java Edition, a bundle including multiple performance mods made by various creators, as well as No Prying Eyes so you don't need to worry about Mojang spying on you for no reason, as well as mitigating the controversial poison ban Mojang can perform on your Minecraft account if they decide they don't like you anymore (Some servers are excluded, due to allowing Mojang bans to be enforced in their moderation).

Everything added into the modpack belongs to their respective creators, be sure to check them out after unpacking!
